query:
-- Step 2: Delete the non-keeper rows (those with lower IDs in duplicate groups)
DELETE m1 FROM monthly_metrics m1
JOIN (
  SELECT aeId, year, month, MAX(id) as keep_id
  FROM monthly_metrics
  GROUP BY aeId, year, month
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
) keepers ON m1.aeId = keepers.aeId AND m1.year = keepers.year AND m1.month = keepers.month
WHERE m1.id != keepers.keep_id;

-- Verify no duplicates remain
SELECT aeId, year, month, COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM monthly_metrics
GROUP BY aeId, year, month
HAVING cnt > 1;

-- Step 2: Delete the non-keeper rows (those with lower IDs in duplicate groups)
DELETE m1 FROM monthly_metrics m1
JOIN (
  SELECT aeId, year, month, MAX(id) as keep_id
  FROM monthly_metrics
  GROUP BY aeId, year, month
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
) keepers ON m1.aeId = keepers.aeId AND m1.year = keepers.year AND m1.month = keepers.month
WHERE m1.id != keepers.keep_id;

-- Verify no duplicates remain
SELECT aeId, year, month, COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM monthly_metrics
GROUP BY aeId, year, month
HAVING cnt > 1;
